name: toggle
title: BTToggle
description: Pressable pill toggle atom. Caller controls `pressed` state; component fires onChange(!pressed) on click. Supports default and outline variants, default and small sizes, optional leftIcon/rightIcon props.

files.content:
export { BTToggle } from './BTToggle';
export type { BTToggleProps, BTToggleVariant, BTToggleSize } from './BTToggle.types';
